\tzpentry{ID3416}{Capacitance Functional}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3416 introduces Capacitance Functional as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathcal{C}_{\mathcal{R}}[\Psi] = \frac{1}{\mathcal{Z}}\int_{\Omega}\Box(\partial_t\Psi)\,dV. \label{eq:example_wave} \end{equation}
